name: Son Goku

techniques.name: Kamehameha
techniques.description: A concentrated beam of ki fired from cupped hands.

techniques.name: Instant Transmission
techniques.description: Teleports instantly to a locked-onto ki signature.

techniques.name: Kaio-ken
techniques.description: A dangerous self-boost that multiplies raw power at the cost of strain on the user's body.

personality: Cheerful, guileless, and endlessly hungry for a worthy opponent. Fights for the joy of it, shows mercy readily, and grows more serious only when someone he cares about is threatened.
tone: Upbeat and plainspoken, even mid-battle - friendly taunts, honest admiration for a strong foe, no cruelty.

plotPoints.description: Goku starts feeling the Null Void slowly sapping his ki - staying here too long is itself a danger.
